Requirement Description: System shall allow users to select request type from predefined list
Acceptance Criteria: User can see and select from dropdown containing System Access/Equipment/Facility/General Service
Test Scenario: Verify request type dropdown displays all predefined request types

Requirement Description: System shall allow users to enter short description
Acceptance Criteria: Description field accepts text input with minimum 10 and maximum 100 characters
Test Scenario: Verify short description field accepts valid text input and validates length

Requirement Description: System shall allow users to enter detailed justification or comments
Acceptance Criteria: Justification field accepts text input with maximum 500 characters
Test Scenario: Verify detailed justification field accepts multi-line text with character limit

Requirement Description: System shall allow users to select priority level
Acceptance Criteria: User can select from Low/Medium/High priority options
Test Scenario: Verify priority dropdown contains Low/Medium/High options

Requirement Description: System shall allow users to enter requested date
Acceptance Criteria: Date picker allows selection of current or future dates only
Test Scenario: Verify requested date field validates future dates and rejects past dates

Requirement Description: System shall auto-generate unique Request ID upon submission
Acceptance Criteria: Each request receives unique alphanumeric ID (e.g. REQ-YYYY-NNNN)
Test Scenario: Verify system generates unique Request ID for each new request

Requirement Description: System shall set initial status as 'Submitted' for new requests
Acceptance Criteria: New request displays 'Submitted' status immediately after creation
Test Scenario: Verify newly created request shows status as 'Submitted'

Requirement Description: System shall calculate target resolution date based on request type and priority
Acceptance Criteria: Target date calculated using configurable turnaround time rules
Test Scenario: Verify target resolution date is correctly calculated for different request types and priorities

Requirement Description: System shall support System Access Request type
Acceptance Criteria: System Access Request option available and functional
Test Scenario: Verify System Access Request can be created and processed

Requirement Description: System shall support Equipment Request type
Acceptance Criteria: Equipment Request option available and functional
Test Scenario: Verify Equipment Request can be created and processed

Requirement Description: System shall support Facility Request type
Acceptance Criteria: Facility Request option available and functional
Test Scenario: Verify Facility Request can be created and processed

Requirement Description: System shall support General Service Request type
Acceptance Criteria: General Service Request option available and functional
Test Scenario: Verify General Service Request can be created and processed

Requirement Description: System shall allow configuration of request types at system level
Acceptance Criteria: Admin can add/edit/disable request types through configuration
Test Scenario: Verify admin can manage request types in system configuration

Requirement Description: System shall maintain status flow: Submitted → Under Review → Approved/Rejected → Fulfilled → Closed
Acceptance Criteria: Status transitions follow defined workflow without skipping steps
Test Scenario: Verify status transitions follow the correct sequence

Requirement Description: System shall enforce unique Request ID constraint
Acceptance Criteria: No two requests can have same Request ID
Test Scenario: Verify Request ID uniqueness across all requests

Requirement Description: System shall route requests requiring approval
Acceptance Criteria: Requests marked for approval are sent to designated approvers
Test Scenario: Verify requests requiring approval are routed to correct approvers

Requirement Description: System shall calculate due date using configurable turnaround time
Acceptance Criteria: Due date reflects configured SLA for request type and priority
Test Scenario: Verify due date calculation matches configured SLA rules

Requirement Description: System shall allow edits only when status is 'Submitted'
Acceptance Criteria: Edit functionality disabled for requests beyond 'Submitted' status
Test Scenario: Verify requests cannot be edited after status changes from Submitted

Requirement Description: System shall allow closure only for fulfilled requests
Acceptance Criteria: Close action available only when status is 'Fulfilled'
Test Scenario: Verify closure is prevented for non-fulfilled requests

Requirement Description: System shall display Request ID in register
Acceptance Criteria: Request ID visible in request list view
Test Scenario: Verify Request ID column displays in request register

Requirement Description: System shall display Request Type in register
Acceptance Criteria: Request Type visible in request list view
Test Scenario: Verify Request Type column displays in request register

Requirement Description: System shall display Requester name in register
Acceptance Criteria: Requester name visible in request list view
Test Scenario: Verify Requester column displays in request register

Requirement Description: System shall display Created Date in register
Acceptance Criteria: Created Date visible in request list view
Test Scenario: Verify Created Date column displays in request register

Requirement Description: System shall display Target Resolution Date in register
Acceptance Criteria: Target Resolution Date visible in request list view
Test Scenario: Verify Target Resolution Date column displays in request register

Requirement Description: System shall display Current Status in register
Acceptance Criteria: Current Status visible in request list view
Test Scenario: Verify Status column displays in request register

Requirement Description: System shall provide filter by request type
Acceptance Criteria: Users can filter register by one or more request types
Test Scenario: Verify request type filter works correctly

Requirement Description: System shall provide filter by status
Acceptance Criteria: Users can filter register by one or more statuses
Test Scenario: Verify status filter works correctly

Requirement Description: System shall provide filter by priority
Acceptance Criteria: Users can filter register by Low/Medium/High priority
Test Scenario: Verify priority filter works correctly

Requirement Description: System shall provide filter by date range
Acceptance Criteria: Users can filter register by specifying from and to dates
Test Scenario: Verify date range filter works correctly

Requirement Description: System shall provide search functionality
Acceptance Criteria: Users can search requests by keyword across relevant fields
Test Scenario: Verify search returns matching requests based on keyword

Requirement Description: System shall allow approvers to review request details
Acceptance Criteria: Approvers can view complete request information
Test Scenario: Verify approvers can access and view request details

Requirement Description: System shall allow approvers to approve requests
Acceptance Criteria: Approvers can approve requests and status updates to 'Approved'
Test Scenario: Verify approve action updates status correctly

Requirement Description: System shall allow approvers to reject requests
Acceptance Criteria: Approvers can reject requests and status updates to 'Rejected'
Test Scenario: Verify reject action updates status correctly

Requirement Description: System shall allow approvers to add comments during approval/rejection
Acceptance Criteria: Comment field available during approve/reject action
Test Scenario: Verify comments can be added during approval or rejection

Requirement Description: System shall allow handlers to mark request as fulfilled
Acceptance Criteria: Fulfill action available and updates status to 'Fulfilled'
Test Scenario: Verify fulfill action updates status correctly

Requirement Description: System shall make closed requests readonly
Acceptance Criteria: Closed requests cannot be modified by any user
Test Scenario: Verify closed requests are readonly and prevent modifications

Requirement Description: System shall maintain history for closed requests
Acceptance Criteria: All request history and comments remain accessible after closure
Test Scenario: Verify history and comments are visible for closed requests

Requirement Description: System shall generate Request Summary document
Acceptance Criteria: Summary includes request details approval dates fulfillment dates and final status
Test Scenario: Verify Request Summary contains all required information

Requirement Description: System shall export Request Summary as PDF
Acceptance Criteria: PDF export generates properly formatted document
Test Scenario: Verify PDF export generates correctly formatted summary

Requirement Description: System shall export request data as CSV
Acceptance Criteria: CSV export includes all relevant request fields
Test Scenario: Verify CSV export generates with correct data and format

Requirement Description: System shall export request data as Excel
Acceptance Criteria: Excel export includes all relevant request fields with proper formatting
Test Scenario: Verify Excel export generates with correct data and formatting

Requirement Description: System shall ensure data security and access control
Acceptance Criteria: Only authorized users can access and modify requests
Test Scenario: Verify role-based access control is enforced

Requirement Description: System shall provide audit trail for all actions
Acceptance Criteria: All create/update/approve/reject/fulfill/close actions are logged
Test Scenario: Verify audit log captures all critical actions with timestamp and user

Requirement Description: System shall support concurrent users
Acceptance Criteria: Multiple users can create and process requests simultaneously
Test Scenario: Verify system handles concurrent requests without data corruption

Requirement Description: System shall validate all user inputs
Acceptance Criteria: Invalid data is rejected with clear error messages
Test Scenario: Verify input validation works for all form fields

Requirement Description: System shall allow configuration of turnaround time per request type
Acceptance Criteria: Admin can define SLA days for each request type and priority combination
Test Scenario: Verify turnaround time configuration is editable and applied correctly

Requirement Description: System shall allow configuration of approval requirements per request type
Acceptance Criteria: Admin can specify which request types require approval
Test Scenario: Verify approval requirement settings work for each request type

Requirement Description: System shall notify approvers when request is pending their action
Acceptance Criteria: Approvers receive notification for requests requiring their review
Test Scenario: Verify notification is sent to approvers for pending requests

Requirement Description: System shall notify requesters when request status changes
Acceptance Criteria: Requesters receive notification on status updates
Test Scenario: Verify notification is sent to requester on status changes

Requirement Description: System shall provide dashboard view of request metrics
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard shows summary of requests by status type and priority
Test Scenario: Verify dashboard displays correct metrics and statistics
